title: Vanilla Pack x Fresh Animations
description: Fresh Animations compatibility add-on for Ar7hur's Vanilla Pack!
body:
An add-on that makes Ar7hur's Vanilla Pack compatible with FreshLX's Fresh Animations.

---

### INSTALLATION GUIDE:
1. Download and install [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) (currently only compatible with version 1.6).
2. Download and install [Ar7hur's Vanilla Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-pack).
3. Finally, place this add-on above both in your resource packs list.

---

### REQUIREMENTS:
OptiFine or any similar mod that supports custom entity models is required.  
Make sure you have it installed, along with both Fresh Animations and Vanilla Pack.

---
